claims.quote: By greeting patients, supporting families, or lending a hand to caregivers, your presence helps create a caring and positive environment, and is an opportunity to share your life experiences while making a positive difference.College StudentsCollege student volunteers gain valuable experience in a healthcare setting while strengthening their resume or application for graduate programs.

claims.quote: Please do NOT apply for rotations through Visiting Student Learning Opportunities (VSLO).Visiting students can apply for a rotation through VSLO .

claims.quote: MHS declination form will be accepted.Health screening including negative PPD or proof of a positive PPD along with negative chest X-ray dated after the positive PPD and an attestation of no symptoms.8 panel drug test or higher within the past 12 months of your rotation (option to order after being accepted on VSLO).Level 2 Background check within the past 12 months of your rotation (option to order after being accepted on VSLO), including:Tri county (Broward, Miami Dade, Palm Beach) background
claims.notPublicReason: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove Memorial Healthcare System - Memorial Regional Hollywood-specific availability
